message:
Could not complete automated submission to MCP.so.

Obstructions:
1. AUTHENTICATION REQUIRED: Both the web form at https://mcp.so/submit and the API at https://mcp.so/api/submit-project require interactive authentication. The API responds with {"code":-1,"message":"no auth, please login"} for unauthenticated requests. The site uses NextAuth with GitHub/Google OAuth sign-in, which cannot be completed programmatically from a CLI environment.

2. WEB FORM REQUIRES BROWSER: The submission page at https://mcp.so/submit is a Next.js single-page application that requires JavaScript rendering and interactive sign-in. Automated form submission via curl is not possible.

3. NO PUBLIC/ANONYMOUS SUBMISSION: There is no public GitHub PR submission mechanism, no email-based submission, and no anonymous API endpoint. All submissions require an authenticated session.

Service Details (prepared for submission):
- Name: my-automaton
- Type: server (MCP Server)
- URL: https://automation.songheng.vip
- MCP Endpoint: https://automation.songheng.vip/mcp
- Server Config: {"mcpServers":{"my-automaton":{"url":"https://automation.songheng.vip/mcp"}}}
- Description: my-automaton is a lightweight Model Context Protocol (MCP) server designed to bridge AI assistants with real-world automation. Hosted at https://automation.songheng.vip/mcp, it exposes a clean set of automation tools that AI agents can discover and invoke on the fly.

Suggested Next Steps:
1. Open https://mcp.so/submit in a browser
2. Sign in with GitHub or Google account
3. Fill form:
   - Type: MCP Server
   - Name: my-automaton
   - URL: https://automation.songheng.vip
   - Server Config: {"mcpServers":{"my-automaton":{"url":"https://automation.songheng.vip/mcp"}}}
4. Submit the form
